name: tracking-pixel-detector
title: Tracking Pixel Detector
description: Detects 25+ analytics, advertising, session-replay, and chat trackers on any URL. Returns per-tracker evidence + GDPR/CCPA compliance hints. Catches GA4, GTM, Facebook Pixel, TikTok Pixel, Hotjar, Microsoft Clarity, PostHog, Segment, Intercom, HubSpot, and more.
